channel.title: Journal of Politeness Research
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Politeness Research

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Rong Chen, Fengguang Liu, Shiyu Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: “Saying ‘thank you’ or something more than lip service”: a variational analysis of the influence of gender and social status on responses to congratulations on Chinese WeChat
item.description: Article by Rong Chen, Fengguang Liu, Shiyu Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2023-0063

item.title: Offering food and alcohol in Chinese and English: a contrastive pragmatic perspective
item.description: Article by Rong Chen, Fengguang Liu, Shiyu Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2023-0077

item.title: Rap Devil versus Rap God: impoliteness in a rap battle
item.description: Article by Rong Chen, Fengguang Liu, Shiyu Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2023-0033

item.description: Article by Rong Chen, Fengguang Liu, Shiyu Liu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/pr-2023-0021

item.title: Intercultural Im/politeness: perceptions of language choice and translanguaging in the Korean community in Australia

item.title: The evolution of research articles on self-denigration: a systematic review across disciplines
